emails.subject: File Index Request - Project Documentation
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

I need your help creating a file index for our project folder. We're doing an audit of all our documentation and logs.

Could you please create an index that includes:
- All Markdown files (.md) - these are our documentation files
- All text files (.txt) - notes and config descriptions
- All log files (.log) - we need to track these for compliance

The index should list each file's path and size so we can see what we're working with.

Once you've created the index, just drop me a message on Slack to let me know it's ready. Also, if you could post a quick summary to the #documentation channel, that would be great for the rest of the team.

Thanks!
Bob
